skill_availability_goal: Verify staged convergence before any success record, one-commit stamping, post-commit confirmation, and handoff only after both gates pass.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 pre-tag audit。维护者已明确确认 `target_release_version: v1.2.0`，`base_ref: v1.1.0`、`target_ref: release-head`，且同名 tag 尚不存在。全部事实通过后，先写统一盖章并只 stage 授权路径，在写入任何 ready_for_tag 成功记录前校验 staged diff；通过后才将成功记录与盖章放入同一普通 commit，再做 target_ref 到该 commit 的确认性复核。两关均通过才向 #120 handoff。
